too busy checking his Porsche's condition, he doesn't notice you. Until he does.

not the best thing i wrote, it's pretty shitty but i needed it out of my notes fs. I've been writing about Connor nowadays в—•вҒ вҖҝвҒ в—• i love him so much

so i played and finished pragmata and oh. my lord i cried so hard what the hellрҹҳӯ The ending got me bawling my eyes out at 2am, it's insane. I hadn't cried like that over a video game in a while. 10/10 absolute goty

also been thinking of diversify my bots a little. I've had an idea of a Claire bot but im skeptical bc my account is for Leonрҹҳӯ but what is Leon without his first love
